overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a winding dirt trail through open prairie grassland. The character navigates around a large tree and rock formation while distant mountains and rolling hills provide the backdrop under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with prominent mountain ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail toward the distant mountain peak

entered.detail: winding dirt path cutting through tall grass
distinctive rocky mountain formation visible in the distance ahead
rolling grassy hills extending to the horizon
large boulders scattered across the grassy terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a dirt trail through open prairie grassland. A prominent mountain peak dominates the center horizon while scattered rocks and rolling hills frame the path on both sides under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail curving around rock and tree obstacles

events.description: character turns left to navigate around large tree and rock cluster blocking the path

agents.ego_description: turning left to path around a large tree and boulder formation on the left side

entered.detail: mature oak tree with dense green foliage beside the trail
cluster of large gray boulders adjacent to the tree

segments.scene_description: The character executes a left turn to navigate around a large tree and rock cluster obstructing the path. The mountain peak shifts from center to the left side of the frame as the camera curves around the obstacles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rolling grassland with winding trail

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path through open grassland

entered.detail: gentle rolling grassland hills stretching into the distance
flock of birds flying across the blue sky

segments.scene_description: Having passed the tree and rocks, the character continues walking through expansive open grassland. Rolling hills dominate the horizon ahead while a flock of birds flies across the sky, and the trail winds gently through the prairie.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt trail that transitions from a mountain-focused vista to an expansive view of the open prairie. It begins with the character walking steadily through grassland, with a prominent mountain peak dominating the center horizon under a clear blue sky. As the character executes a left turn to navigate around a large tree and rock cluster, the camera curves, shifting the mountain peak toward the left side of the frame. The scene then opens up as the character passes these obstacles, moving back into the wide-open grassland where rolling hills take over the horizon. Finally, the trail winds gently through the prairie while a flock of birds flies across the sky, completing the journey through the landscape.
